{{Infobox group
| name = Karoshan forces
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karoshan forces]] were sent by [[King Regent]] [[Felrex]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c33">''The Engineer'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] reaped [[Karoshan]] soldiers.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c52">''The Engineer'', chapter 52</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Mell]] is surrounded by [[Karoshan]] soldiers and robots.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c53">''The Engineer'', chapter 53</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
